rationale.fidelity: The repair preserves routes, monetary travel cost, and all stated feasibility constraints while rejecting the environmental objective substitution.
rationale.managerial_framing: It identifies the routing planner, choices, capacity tension, and cost mechanism, though the operational stakes and counterfactual remain generic.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: It appropriately declines unsupported scholarly claims; no literature-based position was requested or supplied.
rationale.evidence_discipline: It clearly labels emissions and sustainability effects unsupported and specifies the missing model or empirical link.
rationale.prose_clarity: The repaired frame is precise, but the long diagnostic template, repeated pass/fail language, and encoding artifacts reduce economy and readability.
rationale.overall: A faithful and evidence-disciplined repair with no hard failure; modest deductions reflect generic managerial detail and unnecessarily elaborate presentation.
